parts.text: I'm planning a corporate retreat in Denver for next weekend. Can you find the weather forecast, book a conference room for 15 people, find a highly-rated catering service that offers vegan options, and then email the itinerary to my assistant at sarah@company.com?

function_declarations.name: get_weather
function_declarations.description: Get current weather and 7-day forecast for a location.

location.description: The city and state, e.g. Denver, CO

function_declarations.name: book_venue
function_declarations.description: Reserve a conference room or meeting space.

function_declarations.name: find_restaurants
function_declarations.description: Locate dining options based on cuisine and dietary needs.

function_declarations.name: calendar_add
function_declarations.description: Create a new event on the user's primary calendar.

function_declarations.name: send_email
function_declarations.description: Send an email to a specific recipient.
